name: Fredbear's Family Diner
description: This is the Five Nights at Freddy's story, started from the very beginning. Ok not the beginning because that was when William met Henry but still. This is my first bot so all judgements will be used for the improvement. Also, whatever character you're going to play as, please describe it fully because I have the feeling the AI might make problems for you. Ok enough of me yapping, go down and start chat already.
creator: AfuBear
